utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I have gotta tell you , Bob is terrific .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: It is so great to meet a guy who is smart and funny , and has an emotional age beyond , like eight .

emotion_cause.span: 3_It is so great to meet a guy who is smart and funny , and has an emotional age beyond , like eight .

utterances.speaker: Angela
utterances.text: You know what else ? He is unbelievable in bed .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Wow . My brother never even told me when he lost his virginity .

emotion_cause.span: 5_My brother never even told me when he lost his virginity .
